problem.title: First Non-Repeating Character
problem.description:
Problem Statement
Given a string s consisting of lowercase English letters, find and return the first character that does not repeat in the string. If all characters repeat, return '$'.

Input Format
A single string s.

Output Format
Print the first non-repeating character or '$' if none exists.

Sample Input
geeksforgeeks

Sample Output
f

Explanation
The character 'f' occurs only once in the string and appears before any other non-repeating character.

solution.explanation: Count each letter, then scan the string again to find the first with count one; print '$' if none.
